ocr.text: In the Roche Holdings clinical trial enrollment rates and regulatory approval timelines report for March 2025, the data reveals a
comprehensive overview of trial phases and their respective metrics. In Table 1, the headers TrialPhase, EnrollmentRate, and
GeographicalArea are outlined. The values for OngoingTrials indicate 10 total, with PhaseI at 5, PhaseII at 15, and PhaseIII at
20. CompletedTrials show 30 total, with PhaseI at 3, PhaseII at 12, and PhaseIII at 15, while ExpectedEnrollment stands at
TrialPhase  EnrollmentRate  GeographicalArea
PhaseI  50%  NorthAmerica  TotalParticipants
PhaseII  65%  NorthAmerica  TotalParticipants  PhaseIII  75%
OngoingTrials  10  PhaseI  5  PhaseII  15
PhaseIII  20  CompletedTrials  30  PhaseI  3
PhaseII  12  PhaseIII  15  ExpectedEnrollment  1000
PhaseI  200  PhaseII  300  PhaseIII  500
WithdrawnParticipants  50  PhaseI  10  PhaseII  20
PhaseIII  20  TotalEnrollment  950  PhaseI  Total
TotalEnrollment records 950, with contributions from PhaseI at 200, PhaseII at 300, and PhaseIII at 500. WithdrawnParticipants
total 50, with PhaseI at 10 and PhaseII at 20. The EnrollmentRates for PhaseI is 50%, PhaseII is 65%, and PhaseIII is 75%. In
Table 2, the headers DrugName, ApprovalStatus, ApprovalDate, ReviewPhases, Category, Phase1, Phase2, Phase3, TotalDays,
Cost(CAD), MarketPotential, and Comments are listed.
DrugName  ApprovalStatus  ApprovalDate  ReviewPhases  Category
Phase1  Phase2  Phase3  TotalDays  Cost(CAD)  MarketPotential  Comments
Roche-101  Approved  2025-03-15  Clinical  Oncology  120  5M
Roche-102  Pending  N/A  Pre-clinical  Immunology  N/A  3M
Roche-103  Rejected  2025-02-01  Clinical  Neurology  80  2M
Roche-104  Approved  2025-01-10  Clinical  Cardiology  150  6M
Roche-105  Withdrawn  N/A  Pre-clinical  Endocrinology  N/A  Reviewing
Roche-101 is Approved as of 2025-03-15, classified under Clinical in Oncology, with a total review of 120 days and a cost of
$5M. Roche-102 remains Pending with N/A for approval date, categorized as Pre-clinical in Immunology. Roche-103 is
Rejected on 2025-02-01, Clinical in Neurology, taking 80 days at a cost of $2M. Roche-104 is Approved as of 2025-01-10,
Clinical in Cardiology, taking 150 days at a cost of $6M. Roche-105 is Withdrawn, listed as Pre-clinical in Endocrinology, with
N/A for approval date.
